falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,850 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 lows would invalidate the 78% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held at ~4,865; this would confirm a lower low and structural breakdown versus the referenced pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom featured VIX peaking near 28; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation beyond the referenced pattern's stress regime, proving this is not a comparable bottoming structure

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield curve steepens by more than 40 basis points from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Rapid curve steepening would signal recessionary de-risking or banking stress not present in the August 2024 bottom, invalidating the pattern match as a simple cyclical low versus a systemic event

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
